children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Energy Information Administration.

children.heading: Annual Critical Minerals Outlook
children.label: 2 Annual Critical Minerals Outlook
children.text: The term “Annual Critical Minerals Outlook” means the Annual Critical Minerals Outlook prepared under .section 1606(j)(1)(B) of title 30

children.heading: Critical mineral
children.label: 3 Critical mineral
children.text: The term “critical mineral” has the meaning given the term in .section 1606(a) of title 30

children.label: A
children.text: the residential energy expenditures (as defined in section 440.3 of title 10, Code of Federal Regulations (as in effect on )) of the applicable household; byNovember 15, 2021

children.label: B
children.text: the annual income of that household.

children.heading: Household with a high energy burden
children.label: 5 Household with a high energy burden
children.text: The term “household with a high energy burden” has the meaning given the term in section 440.3 of title 10, Code of Federal Regulations (as in effect on ).November 15, 2021

children.label: A
children.text: annually consumes more than 35,000 megawatt-hours of electricity; or

children.label: B
children.text: has a peak power demand of more than 10 megawatts.

children.heading: Load-serving entity
children.label: 7 Load-serving entity
children.text: The term “load-serving entity” has the meaning given the term in .section 824q(a) of title 16

children.label: B
children.text: is not used for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, lighting, water heating, or refrigeration.

children.heading: Regional Transmission Organization
children.label: 9 Regional Transmission Organization
children.text: The term “Regional Transmission Organization” has the meaning given the term in .section 796 of title 16

children.heading: Rural area
children.label: 10 Rural area
children.text: The term “rural area” has the meaning given the term in .section 918c(a) of title 7
